_comment: §6 earnings seed — the designer-monetization story per username. amara.designs carries the ratified C14 canvas ledger VERBATIM (Mobile 267:8613 — the same ₦82,500 available / ₦45,000 in-escrow story as the web canvas A6 demo, web/src/controllers/home-demo.ts designerEarningsDemo): payouts are negative (money leaving the released balance for the bank), escrow rows carry the order's gross hold and tie to the §6 order book (#APR-1042 held · #APR-1058 released Jul 16 with its 10% fee line). available_cents is the post-payout released balance; the fake derives pending from the escrow rows still `held` (45,000 gross — #APR-1042) and gates the ledger invariants the way the web store unit-gates its counts. created_days_ago is relative to the pinned narrative clock (Jul 22), matching the canvas dates Jul 16/15/12/8.
